title: TensorFlow Serving Prediction Response
description: Schema for a prediction inference response from TensorFlow Serving. Returns predictions in row format or outputs in column format.

predictions.description: Row format predictions. One prediction per input instance. Can be a scalar, list, or object.

oneOf.description: Array of predictions, one per input

outputs.description: Column format outputs. Map of output tensor names to arrays of values.

error.description: Error message if the prediction failed
